name: Boeuf Bourguignonne 2
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds beef chuck, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, toss the beef with flour seasoned with instant beef bouillon.
2. Brown the beef in batches in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat using bacon and garlic until browned on all sides.
3. Add herbs, red wine, and water to cover the beef by about an inch. Bring to a simmer.
4. Reduce heat to low and let simmer, covered, for about 2 hours or until meat is tender.
5. Adjust seasoning of gravy with more instant beef bouillon if desired.
6. If desired, add cooked carrots, onions, and mushrooms (browned in butter) to the stew.
